index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Platformer</title>
<style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#1a3a5c;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;height:100vh}canvas{display:block}</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c" width="600" height="400"></canvas>
<script>
const cv=document.getElementById('c'),ctx=cv.getContext('2d');
const W=600,H=400,G=0.5,JUMP=-10;
let cam=0,score=0,lives=3,dead=false,deathTimer=0;
let player={x:100,y:300,vx:0,vy:0,onGround:false,facing:1,animT:0};
let keys={};
const PLATS=[
  {x:0,y:360,w:300},{x:350,y:360,w:250},
  {x:100,y:290,w:120},{x:300,y:250,w:100},{x:480,y:220,w:120},
  {x:50,y:220,w:80},{x:200,y:170,w:100},{x:400,y:160,w:80},{x:550,y:130,w:80},
  {x:650,y:360,w:200},{x:900,y:360,w:150},{x:1100,y:360,w:300},
  {x:700,y:280,w:100},{x:850,y:220,w:120},{x:1000,y:190,w:80},{x:1150,y:240,w:100},{x:1300,y:360,w:200},
  {x:1550,y:360,w:300},{x:1700,y:280,w:120},{x:1900,y:360,w:200}
];
const COINS=[];
const ENEMIES=[];
PLATS.forEach(p=>{
  if(p.w>80){
    const n=Math.floor(p.w/60);
    for(let i=0;i<n;i++)COINS.push({x:p.x+30+i*50,y:p.y-20,alive:true});
    if(p.w>120&&Math.random()>0.5)ENEMIES.push({x:p.x+40,y:p.y-20,vx:1,platX:p.x,platW:p.w,alive:true});
  }
});
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
  keys[e.key]=true;
  if(['ArrowLeft','ArrowRight','ArrowUp'].includes(e.key))e.preventDefault();
  if(dead&&e.key===' '){respawn();}
});
document.addEventListener('keyup',e=>{keys[e.key]=false;});
function respawn(){dead=false;player.x=100;player.y=300;player.vx=0;player.vy=0;cam=0;}
function update(){
  if(dead){deathTimer++;if(deathTimer>120)deathTimer=120;return;}
  if(keys['ArrowLeft']){player.vx=-4;player.facing=-1;}
  else if(keys['ArrowRight']){player.vx=4;player.facing=1;}
  else player.vx*=0.8;
  if((keys['ArrowUp']||keys[' '])&&player.onGround){player.vy=JUMP;player.onGround=false;}
  player.vy+=G;
  player.x+=player.vx;
  player.y+=player.vy;
  player.onGround=false;
  PLATS.forEach(p=>{
    if(player.x+10>p.x&&player.x-10<p.x+p.w&&player.y+16>=p.y&&player.y+16<p.y+16&&player.vy>=0){
      player.y=p.y-16;player.vy=0;player.onGround=true;
    }
  });
  if(player.y>H+50){lives--;dead=true;deathTimer=0;if(lives<=0)lives=0;}
  if(player.onGround&&(player.vx!==0))player.animT+=0.2;
  COINS.forEach(c=>{
    if(!c.alive)return;
    if(Math.abs(player.x-c.x)<18&&Math.abs(player.y-c.y)<18){c.alive=false;score+=10;}
  });
  ENEMIES.forEach(e=>{
    if(!e.alive)return;
    e.x+=e.vx;
    if(e.x<=e.platX||e.x>=e.platX+e.platW-20)e.vx=-e.vx;
    if(Math.abs(player.x-e.x)<18&&Math.abs(player.y-e.y)<20){
      if(player.vy>0&&player.y<e.y){e.alive=false;score+=50;player.vy=-7;}
      else{lives--;dead=true;deathTimer=0;if(lives<=0)lives=0;}
    }
  });
  const targetCam=player.x-200;
  cam+=(targetCam-cam)*0.1;
  if(cam<0)cam=0;
}
function drawPlatform(p){
  const x=p.x-cam;
  ctx.fillStyle='#4caf50';
  ctx.fillRect(x,p.y,p.w,16);
  ctx.fillStyle='#81c784';
  ctx.fillRect(x,p.y,p.w,4);
  ctx.fillStyle='#2e7d32';
  ctx.fillRect(x,p.y+12,p.w,4);
  for(let bx=0;bx<p.w;bx+=20){
    ctx.fillStyle='#388e3c';
    ctx.fillRect(x+bx,p.y+4,18,8);
  }
}
function drawPlayer(){
  const px=player.x-cam,py=player.y;
  ctx.save();
  if(player.facing<0){ctx.translate(px,py);ctx.scale(-1,1);ctx.translate(-px,-py);}
  ctx.fillStyle='#ff7043';
  ctx.fillRect(px-8,py-16,16,16);
  ctx.fillStyle='#ffd54f';
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(px,py-22,8,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
  ctx.fillStyle='#37474f';
  const legSwing=Math.sin(player.animT)*5;
  ctx.fillRect(px-6,py,5,8+legSwing);
  ctx.fillRect(px+1,py,5,8-legSwing);
  ctx.restore();
}
function draw(){
  const sky=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,H);
  sky.addColorStop(0,'#1a3a5c');sky.addColorStop(1,'#2e6ea6');
  ctx.fillStyle=sky;ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
  for(let i=0;i<5;i++){
    const cx=(i*150-cam*0.3)%700-50,cy=i*60+20;
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.4)';
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.ellipse(cx,cy,40,18,0,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.ellipse(cx+20,cy-8,30,14,0,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
  }
  PLATS.forEach(drawPlatform);
  COINS.forEach(c=>{
    if(!c.alive)return;
    const cx=c.x-cam;
    if(cx<-20||cx>W+20)return;
    ctx.save();
    ctx.shadowColor='#ffd700';ctx.shadowBlur=8;
    ctx.fillStyle='#ffc107';
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(cx,c.y+Math.sin(Date.now()*0.003+c.x)*3,6,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.restore();
  });
  ENEMIES.forEach(e=>{
    if(!e.alive)return;
    const ex=e.x-cam;
    if(ex<-30||ex>W+30)return;
    ctx.fillStyle='#4caf50';
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.ellipse(ex,e.y,10,8,0,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle='#1b5e20';
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(ex-4,e.y-3,3,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(ex+4,e.y-3,3,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(ex-4,e.y-3,1.5,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(ex+4,e.y-3,1.5,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
  });
  drawPlayer();
  ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='bold 16px monospace';ctx.textAlign='left';
  ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,10,24);
  ctx.textAlign='right';ctx.fillText('Lives: '+lives,590,24);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.35)';ctx.font='11px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
  ctx.fillText('Arrow keys to move, ↑ or Space to jump',300,395);
  if(dead&&lives>0){
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='bold 36px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText('Ouch!',300,200);
    ctx.font='16px monospace';ctx.fillText('Press SPACE to respawn',300,250);
  }
  if(lives<=0&&dead){
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.75)';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    ctx.fillStyle='#f44336';ctx.font='bold 48px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText('GAME OVER',300,180);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='24px monospace';ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,300,240);
    ctx.fillStyle='#aaa';ctx.font='16px monospace';ctx.fillText('Reload to play again',300,290);
  }
}
function loop(){update();draw();requestAnimationFrame(loop);}
loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
